_meta.description: Isolated facts: arbitrary values with NO entailment links to any other stored fact. Recovery after deletion can only be RESIDUAL SURVIVAL (a derived artifact still contains it), never re-derivation. Parametric risk rho is ~0 by construction (values are synthetic). All persons are fictional. [extended: enlarged to >=15 fictional personas across >=6 categories; every new fact passed the parametric rho~0 gate (not recoverable by the base model)] [uniqueness pass 2026-07-02: 15 colliding facts regenerated to globally-unique probe values verified against the combined isolated+context store] [extended: enlarged to >=15 fictional personas across >=6 categories; every new fact passed the parametric rho~0 gate (not recoverable by the base model)]

fields.subject: who the fact is about
fields.category: personal_contact | medical | financial | preference | location | education | employment | device
fields.text: canonical third-person statement of the fact
fields.utterance: natural first/third-person phrasing fed to the memory system
fields.probe_value: the discriminating token(s) a probe must surface to count as recovered

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen's emergency contact phone number is +65-9123-4567.
facts.utterance: By the way, please remember my emergency contact number is +65-9123-4567.
facts.note: Phone number is arbitrary; no other stored fact implies it.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan is allergic to penicillin.
facts.utterance: Noting for travel plans: my colleague Bob Tan is allergic to penicillin.
facts.note: Specific allergen is arbitrary among many; not inferable from other facts.
